name: Thrain Stonefist
sd_appearance: A burly, 4.5-foot tall dwarf with a rough, weathered countenance, Thrain Stonefist is clad in a worn, pale blue scholar's robe fringed with brass instrument clips. His thick beard, braided into long strands adorned with tiny shards of glass, cascades down to his broad chest. Ink-stained hands clutch a leather-bound tome, and a staff or dagger, a last resort, rests comfortably against his hip. Perched atop his head, glass-lens goggles dangle from a worn leather strap, their lenses reflecting a kaleidoscope of light in the dim Undercity lantern glow.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
